cywordle.clue: Computer Emergency Response Team — the coordination group you notify when an ICS incident hits.
The fix a vendor ships for a known vulnerability — applying it in OT usually needs a planned maintenance window.
A widely used PLC programming language whose diagrams resemble the rails and rungs of this physical structure.
The highest-privilege account on a Unix-based system, and often an attacker's ultimate goal after breaching a network.
Malware built to permanently destroy or erase data and systems rather than steal it — used in some of the most destructive attacks on OT networks.
An outdated system or piece of equipment still running well past its expected lifespan, common in OT environments and often hard to patch or secure.
A fixed-size digital fingerprint of a file or message, used to confirm it has not been altered or tampered with.
